svg.text: Twenty-four plants — arbitrary colour vs. state
Illustrative scale. Today every card wears an assigned identity colour — pretty noise. Proposed, colour can only mean state, so the plants that need water pop.
Today · 24 assigned colours, none of them state
Proposed · colour finds the plant that needs you
Identity never travels by colour (rule 3) — so colour is free to mean one thing: state (rule 1). That is the charter paying off at scale.
